en_title: Will PS6 Be Like a Nintendo Switch? Sony Says Its Next-Gen Console Will Enable 'A Seamless Experience That Can Be Enjoyed Naturally Beyond the Living Room'
cn_title: 《任天堂》索尼：PS6将实现客厅之外的无缝体验
subtitle: 不再限于客厅
opus_summary: 索尼互动娱乐总裁西野秀明在问答中透露，下一代PlayStation将提供「客厅之外的无缝体验」，外界猜测PS6或推出类似Switch的混合便携形态。

paragraphs.en: Sony has suggested its next-gen console — widely assumed to be the PlayStation 6 — could work like the Nintendo Switch by enabling “a seamless experience that can be enjoyed naturally beyond the living room.”
paragraphs.cn: 索尼暗示，其下一代主机——外界普遍认为将是 PS6——可能会像 Switch 那样，带来「客厅之外也能自然享受的无缝体验」。

paragraphs.en: The comments come from a recent Q&A with Sony Interactive Entertainment president and CEO, Hideaki Nishino, published in English by Sony itself. In it, the executive was asked how Sony plans to reingage with users PlayStation lost to PC gaming during Covid lockdowns, and how it will make significant changes with the next-generation platform.
paragraphs.cn: 这些评论来自索尼自己以英文发布的一份近期问答，受访者是索尼互动娱乐总裁兼CEO西野秀明。在问答中，他被问及索尼打算如何重新吸引那些在疫情封锁期间转向PC游戏的PlayStation用户，以及将如何通过下一代平台实现重大变革。

paragraphs.en: Nishino replied to point to how Sony is trying to change the perception that “PlayStation equals the living room” with the release of PlayStation monitors and speakers people would typically use as part of a PC setup.
paragraphs.cn: 西野秀明回应称，索尼正试图通过推出通常用于PC配置的PlayStation显示器和音箱，来改变「PlayStation即客厅」的固有印象。

paragraphs.en: “PlayStation has long been strongly associated with the idea of playing in the living room,” Nishino began. “However, in recent years, more users globally have been using personal monitors. In response, we are selling peripherals such as monitors and speakers to break away from the fixed perception that ‘PlayStation equals the living room’ and to broaden usage scenarios.”
paragraphs.cn: 「PlayStation长久以来都与在客厅玩游戏紧密联系在一起，」西野秀明说道。「然而，近年来，全球越来越多的用户开始使用个人显示器。为此，我们正在销售显示器和音箱等外设，以打破‘PlayStation等于客厅’的固有印象，并拓展使用场景。」

paragraphs.en: At this point, Nishino discussed Sony’s next-generation platform, without naming it or offering any concrete details.
paragraphs.cn: 随后，西野秀明谈到了索尼的下一代平台，但没有提及名称或任何具体细节。

paragraphs.en: “For the next-generation platform, rather than simply serving as an alternative to PCs, we aim to deliver value that is unique to PlayStation,” he said. “This includes not only technological advancements but also an expansion of usage styles, enabling a seamless experience that can be enjoyed naturally beyond the living room.”
paragraphs.cn: 「对于下一代平台，我们不希望它仅仅是PC的替代品，而是要提供PlayStation独有的价值，」他说。「这不仅包括技术进步，还包括使用方式的扩展，实现一种在客厅之外也能自然享受的无缝体验。」

paragraphs.en: It’s that last part that has people wondering if Sony plans to release a PlayStation hybrid console like the Nintendo Switch. A console that offers a “seamless experience that can be enjoyed naturally beyond the living room” sure does sound like something that could be taken on the go, like the Switch. But what could that look like?
paragraphs.cn: 正是这一点引发外界猜测，索尼是否计划推出类似任天堂Switch的混合主机。一台承诺「客厅之外仍能自然体验无缝游戏」的主机，听起来确实像是可以随身携带的设备，正如Switch那样。但这究竟会是怎样的形态？

paragraphs.en: There are a number of options. Sony is heavily rumored to be working on a dedicated PS6 handheld . Could this double as a PS6 console / controller hybrid that could be docked, as Switch is? Or perhaps Sony is working on a PS6 that’s little more than a next-gen PlayStation Portal, which Nishino said had seen strong sales.
paragraphs.cn: 索尼有多种选择。传闻索尼正在研发一款专用的PS6掌机。这款设备能否像Switch一样，充当可插底座的PS6主机与控制器混合体？又或者，索尼正在开发的PS6不过是下一代PlayStation Portal的微升级版——西野表示该设备销量强劲。

paragraphs.en: Either way, Nishino pointed to cloud gaming as a potential solve for the trouble Sony is having with the ongoing RAMpocalypse .
paragraphs.cn: 无论如何，西野指出，云游戏可能是索尼应对当前内存短缺危机（RAMpocalypse）的一个潜在解决方案。

paragraphs.en: “With regard to cloud gaming, our priority since our service launch in 2013 has been to ensure a high-quality user experience from the first time they use the service, as performance is highly dependent on network conditions and poor quality can quickly erode trust,” Nishino explained.
paragraphs.cn: 「至于云游戏，自2013年推出服务以来，我们的首要任务一直是确保用户从首次使用服务起就能获得高品质体验，因为性能很大程度上取决于网络条件，而糟糕的体验会迅速侵蚀用户信任。」西野解释道。

paragraphs.en: “For this reason, we designed PS Portal as a dedicated device to reliably deliver the PlayStation gaming experience, which is predicated on controller-based gameplay and a large screen. Because it is difficult to provide a sufficiently high-quality experience through smartphone touch controls or a PC’s keyboard and mouse, our cloud strategy is not to rapidly expand to smartphones and PCs, but rather to focus on environments where quality can be assured.
paragraphs.cn: 「正因如此，我们才将PS Portal设计为专用设备，以可靠地提供建立在手柄操控和大屏幕之上的PlayStation游戏体验。由于通过智能手机触控或PC键鼠难以提供足够高品质的体验，我们的云策略不是快速扩展至手机和PC，而是专注于能够确保质量的环境。」

paragraphs.en: “While we do not disclose unit sales figures, PS Portal has seen strong demand across North America, Europe, and Japan, with servers reaching full capacity during the latest holiday season. Cloud streaming also requires minimal memory, making it an increasingly attractive low-cost thin client device in the current market environment where memory prices are rising. Looking ahead, we aim to expand cloud gaming experience while maintaining the quality cultivated to date.”
paragraphs.cn: 「尽管我们不公布具体销量数据，但PS Portal在北美、欧洲和日本需求强劲，最近一个圣诞假期期间服务器甚至满负荷运转。云串流对内存的需求极低，在当前内存价格攀升的市场环境中，它正成为越来越有吸引力的低成本瘦客户端设备。展望未来，我们计划在保持现有品质的基础上，进一步拓展云游戏体验。」

paragraphs.en: My take is that Sony is working on a number of PS6 options, each of varying price. I’m sure there will be a traditional home console version of the PS6, one that provides the most horsepower but also commands a premium price. But then I wouldn’t be surprised to see Sony offer a cheaper, less powerful PS6, as Microsoft has done with the Xbox Series S. On top of this, I suspect Sony is indeed working on a PS6 handheld that may work like the Switch. And then there’s a potential cloud gaming-powered next-gen PlayStation Portal, which is potentially the cheapest option of the lot.
paragraphs.cn: 在我看来，索尼正在开发多款价格各异的PS6机型。我确信会有一款传统家用主机版PS6，性能最强但定价也最高。但之后看到索尼推出更便宜、性能稍低的PS6我也不会意外，就像微软推出XBOX Series S那样。此外，我怀疑索尼确实在开发一款可能类似Switch的PS6掌机。另外还有一款可能由云游戏驱动的下一代PlayStation Portal，这可能是所有选项中最便宜的一个。

paragraphs.en: Microsoft has promised an ultra powerful next-gen console in the form of Project Helix, which will also play PC games, but it may also have similar plans to offer a range of options. Earlier this month, Xbox boss Asha Sharma said the spiralling cost of new and existing consoles would require "radically different business models" over the coming generation .
paragraphs.cn: 微软已承诺推出代号 Project Helix 的超强下一代主机，该主机还可运行 PC 游戏，但公司似乎也有类似的规划，准备提供多种选择。本月早些时候，XBOX 负责人 Asha Sharma 表示，新主机和现有主机的成本不断飙升，未来一代将需要「彻底不同的商业模式」。

paragraphs.en: Wesley is Director, News at IGN. Find him on Twitter at @wyp100. You can reach Wesley at wesley_yinpoole@ign.com or confidentially at wyp100@proton.me.
